heroHeading: A safe place to land, grow, and belong.
heroText: After Teen Lounge provides a structured, welcoming space where teens can focus on homework, connect with others, and take part in positive activities after school.
featureText: Open gym, creative space, games, and a quiet study area are available throughout the evening.
featureItemOneText: Doors open, check-in begins, and study hall is available.
featureItemTwoText: Group activities, games, and community time kick off.
